gherkin.given: a source-qualified series has persistent positive direction across the selected horizon and residual wiggles below the change threshold
gherkin.when: the balanced production registry and consensus are evaluated
gherkin.then: the result is a sustained rising trend with strength and uncertainty, no wiggle becomes a turn, and supporting and contradicting families remain visible

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-001 noisy sustained trend ignores sub-threshold residual wiggles

gherkin.given: an established rising trend has a persistent slope increase above the governed effect threshold
gherkin.when: production trend dynamics are evaluated
gherkin.then: direction remains rising while dynamics are accelerating with units, horizon, uncertainty, persistence, and confirming families

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-002 sustained uptrend reports accelerating dynamics separately

gherkin.given: a supported positive trend slope is declining but has not crossed reversal or change confirmation gates
gherkin.when: production trend dynamics are evaluated
gherkin.then: the result remains a decelerating rising trend and exposes distinct inflection confirmation and invalidation conditions

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-003 decelerating uptrend remains positive and exposes invalidation

gherkin.given: an online detector raises a source-qualified peak candidate and an independent family later confirms it
gherkin.when: the production replay advances through actual availability cutoffs
gherkin.then: the record remains provisional before confirmation and separately shows estimated effective, first detection, confirmation, and delay times

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-004 provisional peak keeps effective detection and confirmation times separate

gherkin.given: early sensitivity raises a reversal candidate and later observations restore the prior trend before confirmation
gherkin.when: the production history reevaluates the candidate
gherkin.then: the original cutoff, parameters, alert time, and record remain immutable and an appended revision marks it invalidated with a false-alarm outcome

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-005 failed early reversal remains immutable and invalidated

scenarios.title: Sensitivity changes risk rather than integrity

gherkin.given: one valid series, transform, horizon, and source cutoff
gherkin.when: the user changes from cautious to early sensitivity within configured bounds
gherkin.then: detection timing, false alarms, misses, revisions, and governed thresholds may change while source, history, as-of, multiplicity, family independence, and invalidation gates remain identical

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-006 early sensitivity changes risk metrics but preserves integrity gates

gherkin.given: a two-sided final estimate dates a turn before the one-sided production detector first alerted
gherkin.when: the user compares replay and retrospective views
gherkin.then: both dates and endpoint postures remain separate and early-warning history uses only the real-time detection date with explicit endpoint revision and delay

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-007 retrospective turn never backdates the real-time alert

gherkin.given: a source-qualified regular series has enough complete weekly and annual repetitions
gherkin.when: production harmonic, regular-spectrum, and stability methods evaluate it after break handling
gherkin.then: weekly and annual components retain separate strength, amplitude, phase, drift, repetition, and residual records and neither becomes trend

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-008 weekly and annual components remain separate from trend

scenarios.title: Irregular observations create no synthetic evidence

gherkin.given: a source-qualified series has uneven availability times and missing intervals
gherkin.when: the production foundation validates quality and resolves method eligibility
gherkin.then: the original observations and gaps remain explicit, no interval is silently interpolated, and regular-only methods are unavailable

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-009 irregular sampling creates no invented observations

scenarios.title: Long-cycle history insufficiency is terminal for phase

gherkin.given: a configured quasi-periodic cycle requires multiple complete repetitions and the selected series has less history
gherkin.when: production cycle eligibility is evaluated
gherkin.then: the cycle is ineligible with exact duration and repetition shortfall and no phase, next-turn date, confidence, or neutral substitute exists

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-010 insufficient long-cycle history yields no phase or next turn

scenarios.title: Technology attention remains a lifecycle proxy

gherkin.given: a configured technology entry declares lifecycle stages and a source-qualified attention proxy but no stable recurrence
gherkin.when: the production cycle-type contract is evaluated
gherkin.then: the entry remains lifecycle context with proxy limitations and exposes no oscillatory period, phase, or adoption claim

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-011 technology attention remains a lifecycle proxy not an oscillation

gherkin.given: an official election or budget date is configured and prior target effects have dispersion
gherkin.when: the production cycle-type contract is evaluated
gherkin.then: the date remains deterministic calendar context and direction and magnitude remain evidence-qualified scenarios rather than a turn signal

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-012 official political date remains uncertain calendar context

scenarios.title: Climate context stays geographically and seasonally scoped

gherkin.given: an official ENSO state and a target-specific regional and seasonal mechanism record are source qualified
gherkin.when: production climate context is evaluated
gherkin.then: source, phase, confidence, season, geography, mechanism, dispersion, and limitations are visible and no universal target effect is asserted

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-013 ENSO context stays scoped to source season geography and mechanism

gherkin.given: a source definition change or intervention creates a persistent level shift
gherkin.when: production periodicity and cycle activation are evaluated
gherkin.then: break evidence is shown first and unresolved contamination blocks or reduces periodic conclusions

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-014 structural break blocks contaminated cycle activation

scenarios.title: Multiple searches are corrected and held out

gherkin.given: production evaluation scans multiple periods, transforms, lags, contexts, or regions
gherkin.when: ranking and activation evidence are calculated
gherkin.then: exact search breadth, raw evidence, BH discovery, Holm activation, and frozen held-out results are visible and a failing in-sample winner is unsupported

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-015 period and lag scans expose correction and reject in-sample winners

gherkin.given: trend families support acceleration while independent change and regime families remain below confirmation
gherkin.when: the production consensus is formed
gherkin.then: disagreement remains visible and the result cannot become a confirmed regime change through averaging or correlated method counts

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-016 method-family disagreement remains mixed and unconfirmed

gherkin.given: availability-safe target and context series show a lagged relationship and no independent mechanism is established
gherkin.when: production lead-lag evaluation completes
gherkin.then: overlap, transform, lag search, effect, uncertainty, stability, regime dependence, held-out result, and search breadth are visible and the label remains association

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-017 lead-lag evidence remains association without a mechanism

scenarios.title: Missing stale and incompatible inputs remain truthful

gherkin.given: required observations are missing, stale, unit-incompatible, or unavailable at the selected cutoff
gherkin.when: the production foundation resolves quality, truth state, and eligible methods
gherkin.then: exact reasons are visible, cached data are not called current, and no missing value becomes zero, neutral evidence, confidence, or a conclusion

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-018 missing stale and incompatible inputs never become current or neutral

scenarios.title: Simple and Power share one result

gherkin.given: one valid selected series and one resolved request and complete result
gherkin.when: the user switches Simple and Power or changes any governed local control
gherkin.then: both views retain one result id, request digest, truth state, trend, dynamics, turn, cycle relevance, focus context, and parameters and unchanged source data are not refetched

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-019 Simple Power mobile and local controls share one result without refetch
Regression: SCN-006-019 charts controls focus and 390px layout remain accessible and equivalent

gherkin.given: the owning result is mixed, stale, degraded, or unavailable
gherkin.when: the page publishes and a registry consumer reads the versioned owner envelope
gherkin.then: the same truth, caveat, omitted invalid fields, and deep link remain and the consumer cannot fill evidence, upgrade confidence, or recalculate the verdict

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-006-020 owner read preserves mixed stale degraded and unavailable truth
Regression: SCN-006-020 registration navigation and owner publication stay in parity
